_comment: The list of lecture decks the player offers when opened with no ?deck= parameter. Deliberately just ids: the player fetches each deck for its own title and slide count, so a deck's title lives in exactly one place (the deck file) and cannot drift out of sync with a copy here. Add a line when you add a deck. icebreakers.json is not listed - it is a shared pool, not a deck, and has no slides array.
